jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Medtronic India
jsonLd.description:
Medtronic India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!
